name: music-kb
description: Local SQLite music-analysis search for agents, with natural-language conversation UX and read-only MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Find songs by ordinary language in a local, read-only Music Flamingo library.
interface.longDescription: A local-first SQLite knowledge base: publishers create verified snapshots; users can ask for songs naturally, compare bounded result directions, and refine a chosen direction while agents query a read-only local copy through MCP.
defaultPrompt: 我需要一些 R&B、温暖的、关于爱情的歌
找一些有氛围感的歌，先按几个可能方向给我看看
找带“人声切片”标签的歌，并给我试听链接
